A whimsical world of creativity, community, and exquisite cuisine.

Our Story

More Than a Coffee Shop — A Community

Welcome to Kixi Café, a coffee lover's dream in the heart of Mizner Park. We serve aromatic coffees from our favorite local roaster, Wells Coffee, alongside delectable breakfast, brunch, and lunch options — including our signature Japanese soufflé pancakes.

Enjoy our dog-friendly patio, which embodies Boca Raton's vibrant charm. At Kixi, every visit is a chance to savor life's joys in a warm, whimsical setting.

☕ Wells Coffee 🥞 Soufflé Pancakes 🐕 Dog Friendly 🌿 Garden Patio 📸 Instagrammable

What We Offer

Our Menu

☕

Coffee & Drinks

Specialty coffees sourced from Wells Coffee, our favorite local roaster. Lattes, matcha, seasonal specials and signature drinks.

🥞

Signature Pancakes

Our legendary Japanese soufflé pancakes — impossibly fluffy, beautifully presented, and worth every moment of the wait.

🍳

Breakfast & Brunch

From classic eggs benedict to creative avocado toasts — a full breakfast and brunch menu crafted with care and fresh ingredients.

🥗

Lunch

Light and satisfying lunch options including salads, sandwiches, and daily specials that keep you coming back.

🎂

Pastries & Sweets

House-made pastries, cakes, and sweet treats to complement your coffee or enjoy on their own.

🐾

Dog-Friendly Patio

Bring your four-legged friends! Our garden patio welcomes well-behaved dogs. Water bowls always available.

Private Events

Host Your Next Event at Kixi

Whether it's a birthday brunch, a bridal shower, or a corporate gathering — our enchanting space is available for private events. We'll create a personalized menu and atmosphere that your guests will never forget.
